label: 1T342MFX Test Payload
info: Quick test flow to send a raw 1T342MFX access event to the backend API

name: Build Event Payload
func:
msg.payload = {
    major: 5,
    minor: 76,
    time: new Date().toISOString(),
    cardType: 1,
    cardReaderNo: 1,
    doorNo: 1,
    serialNo: 5341,
    currentVerifyMode: 'faceOrFpOrCardOrPw',
    mask: 'no',
    pictureURL: 'http://10.12.1.97/LOCALS/pic/acsLinkCap/202604_00/07_053225_30076_0.jpeg',
    FaceRect: { x: 1, y: 2, w: 3, h: 4 },
    eventDescription: '(EVENT) Face Authentication Failed',
    source: 'Node-RED Test'
};

return msg;

name: Check Response
